query: How many Buddhist texts do you have?

response: The library holds 5,659 Bahá'í documents, which are spread across several collections. These include the *Core Tablets*, which feature foundational scriptures by Bahá'u'lláh and 'Abdu'l-Bahá, and the *Tablet Translations*, with 738 documents translating the Báb's and Bahá'u'lláh's writings. Additionally, there are *Baha'i Books* with 623 documents, and *Administrative* texts covering constitutional documents and institutional guidance. These collections provide a comprehensive view of Bahá'í teachings and history.

response: The largest collection in the library is the "null" category, with 35,931 documents. Among specific traditions, the Bahá'í collection is the most extensive, holding [5,659 documents](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Baha'i%20Books/adib-taherzadeh_the-revelation-of-bahaullah-vol-2#p1251). This includes foundational texts like the [Core Tablets](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Tablet%20Translations/bahaullah_ode-of-the-dove-qasidiy-i-varqaiyyih-2#p229) and [Tablet Translations](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Baha'i%20Books/udo-schaefer_bahai-ethics-in-light-of-scripture-vol-2#p1800), which are central to Bahá'í teachings.

query: Do you have any Jain texts?
response: Yes, the library includes Jain texts, with a total of [27 documents](https://siftersearch.com/library/Jain/Philosophy/tr-hermann-jacobi_jaina-sutras-part-i-sbe-vol-22#p19) available. These include canonical scriptures like the [Akaranga Sutra](https://siftersearch.com/library/Jain/Agamas/tr-hermann-jacobi_akaranga-sutra-book-1#p0), which are foundational to Jain teachings. If you're interested in exploring Jain philosophy or ethics, these texts are a great resource.
